channel.title: Privacy Tools on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Privacy Tools on simeononsecurity

item.title: Flock Finder: Open-Source Tool for Mapping Flock Safety ALPR Surveillance Cameras
item.category: "Privacy Technology" , "Counter Surveillance" , "Open Source Projects" , "Digital Rights" , "Network Security" , "Privacy Tools" , "Hardware Hacking" , "Security Research"
item.description: Flock Finder is an open-source tool that maps 40,000+ Flock Safety ALPR cameras worldwide using WiGLE WiFi data and OUI fingerprinting. Learn how it works, its limitations, and the hardware tools for real-time detection.

item.title: Eye Spy: Passive Surveillance Detector for the M5Stack Atom Lite (ESP32)
item.category: "Privacy Tools" , "Counter-Surveillance" , "IoT Security" , "Embedded Systems" , "Security Research" , "WiFi Security" , "Bluetooth Security" , "ESP32 Projects" , "Hardware Security" , "Open Source Security"
item.description: A complete technical reference for Eye Spy v1.1 - an open-source passive BLE and WiFi surveillance detector running on the M5Stack Atom Lite (ESP32-PICO-D4) that scans for body cameras, ALPR systems, AirTags, drones, and hidden cameras using a confidence-score threat model and a single RGB LED.

item.title: ESP32 WiFi Canary: Passive 2.4 GHz Threat Detection with RGB LED Alerts
item.category: "Network Security" , "WiFi Security" , "IoT Security" , "Security Research" , "Embedded Systems" , "Privacy Tools" , "ESP32 Projects" , "Hardware Security" , "Wireless Security" , "Open Source Security"
item.description: A detailed breakdown into the ESP32 WiFi Canary project - a compact, passive 2.4 GHz awareness sensor for the M5Stack Atom Lite that silently watches for evil-twin APs, deauthentication attacks, security downgrades, and beacon floods using a confidence-scored threat model and a single RGB LED.

item.title: DagShell Custom Firmware for Orbic RCL400: Complete Installation and Usage Guide 2026
item.category: "Custom Firmware" , "Mobile Security" , "Privacy Tools" , "Network Security" , "Wardriving" , "Penetration Testing" , "IoT Hacking" , "Security Research" , "Hardware Hacking" , "Privacy Technology"
item.description: Comprehensive guide to DagShell custom firmware for Orbic RCL400 hotspot including installation, privacy tools, hacking features, wardriving capabilities, and why it pairs perfectly with RayHunter for mobile security research.

item.title: Flock-You Detection Project: Complete Counter-Surveillance Hardware and Setup Guide 2026
item.category: "Security Hardware" , "Counter Surveillance" , "Privacy Technology" , "Open Source Projects" , "ESP32 Development" , "WiFi Monitoring" , "Privacy Tools" , "Digital Rights" , "Hardware Hacking" , "Network Security"
item.description: Comprehensive technical guide to the open-source Flock-You project for detecting Flock Safety ALPR cameras using ESP32-based hardware. Includes setup instructions, firmware details, and purchasing options.

item.title: Today I Learned about Android Debloating and a New Privacy Technique
item.category: "Android Security" , "Privacy Tools" , "Mobile Device Optimization" , "Android Debloating" , "Security Enhancements" , "Privacy Techniques" , "Mobile App Management" , "Image Anonymization" , "Data Privacy" , "Mobile Device Privacy"
item.description:
What SimeonOnSecurity learned about and found interesting today

Today, SimeonOnSecurity came across two interesting and useful security and privacy related tools: Universal Android Debloater and DeepPrivacy.

The Universal Android Debloater is a bash script using ADB (Android Debug Bridge) to debloat non-rooted Android devices. This tool can help to improve privacy, security and battery life of your device by removing unwanted apps and bloatware. You can find the Universal Android Debloater at https://gitlab.com/W1nst0n/universal-android-debloater .

item.title: Online Tools - SimeonOnSecurity
item.category: "technology" , "cybersecurity" , "online tools" , "passwords" , "hash calculator" , "network tools" , "image tools" , "file permissions" , "data tools" , "privacy tools" , "online security" , "data protection"
item.description: Explore a comprehensive collection of online tools, including a Password Strength Checker, Hash Calculator, Base64 Encoder, Shodan IP Lookup, and more. Optimize your cybersecurity and improve online privacy.

item.title: SimeonOnSecurity's Expert Recommendations for Security and Privacy Products and Resources
item.category: "Cybersecurity" , "Privacy Protection" , "Product Recommendations" , "Resource Recommendations" , "Security Tools" , "Privacy Tools" , "Data Protection" , "Internet Privacy"
item.description: Explore SimeonOnSecurity's expert recommendations for trusted and highly rated security and privacy-related products and resources.
